rows.label: qev031208_MSG0001
rows.name: Ugh... Uuh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0002
rows.name:
Leroy! Are you okay!? Why are you
doing something so reckless...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0003
rows.name: Guh... Because... that's...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems the match is settled. Lavina...
We're returning to our comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0005
rows.name: Father...! But I... for Leroy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0006
rows.name:
No! He's not even a Bias... Let alone such
a weakling! I won't give you to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0007
rows.name: ...Now, let's go. Give up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0008
rows.name: ...Father-in-law, I'm... ...Guh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0009
rows.name:
You should give up, too. You can't
fight with that body anymore, can you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Even if I can't fight, I'll
fight! Because... when we ran
away here, I made a decision...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0011
rows.name:
No matter who it is, I won't run
away from anyone who hurts her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hmph, that weakling has certainly
learned how to talk back, hasn't he.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Hey, what happened to this
man? You're a fellow Earthling,
so you'd know, wouldn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_JNK0010
rows.name: Understand

rows.label: qev031208_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that his love for her changed Leroy.

rows.label: qev031208_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev031208_SEL0021
rows.name:
Shrug your shoulders and
say you don't really know.

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0014
rows.name:
He cares for my daughter that
much... with that tiny body of his?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0015
rows.name:
Right, it's completely incomprehensible. Why
doesn't he love a fellow Earthling? Why does
he stand back up when he's so battered?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0016
rows.name: He truly is a man I cannot understand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0017
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Lavina, we're going home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0019
rows.name: I told you, I...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0020
rows.name:
However, the marriage to
Wazdo Tygant is canceled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'll give that man a chance for a
while... So... we're going home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0022
rows.name: Eh...? Does that mean...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0023
rows.name:
Yeah... Lavina, go back
to your father for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll absolutely become a man
worthy of your father's approval,
and then I'll come get you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0025
rows.name:
...I understand. I'll
wait for you forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031208_MSG0026
rows.name:
But if I become an old lady, we won't be
able to enjoy our time together very
much, so... Come get me quickly, okay![ST:wait ]
